title: AI in Mining Industry Africa to Take Center Stage at African Mining Week 2026
description: AI in Mining Industry Africa – As African nations increasingly adopt advanced technologies and AI to optimize operations across the mining value chain, the upcoming African Mining Week (AMW) – The Most Influential Mining Conference in Africa, scheduled for October 14–16 in Cape Town – will bring together technology providers, investors, project developers and regulators [...]

title: Draft AI Policy: Why South Africa must fund local innovators to compete on the global stage
description: As South Africa unveils its Draft AI Policy, experts warn that without funding for local innovators, the country risks falling behind in the global tech race.

title: Will AI take India’s jobs or create them? Bernstein flags big risks in letter to PM Modi
description: A new letter from Bernstein raises tough questions about India’s AI future. While the technology promises growth, it could also disrupt millions of jobs. The report urges urgent reforms to ensure India builds its own AI strength instead of depending on global tech giants.

title: Bernstein’s open letter to PM Narendra Modi: A wake-up call on jobs, AI, and economic reforms
description: A recent letter by Bernstein to PM Narendra Modi highlights risks to India’s growth, warning that AI-driven job losses, weak manufacturing absorption, and low R&D investment could undermine long-term economic potential unless bold reforms are implemented. The post Bernstein’s open letter to PM Narendra Modi: A wake-up call on jobs, AI, and economic reforms first appeared on ET Edge Insights .

title: UK's Computacenter forecasts strong year as AI and data centre demand lifts orders
description: April 24 : British technology and services provider Computacenter said on Friday it would beat annual profit forecasts, as clients brought forward hardware orders amid supply shortages linked to a data centre and artificial intelligence investment boom.Shares in the company, which helps large organisations so
